diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect.py
+++ b/inspect.py
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+import pandas as pd

+import os

+data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')

+train = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(data_dir, 'train.csv'))

+val = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(data_dir, 'val.csv'))

+print('train shape:', train.shape)

+print('val shape:', val.shape)

+print(train.head())

+print('seq len:', train.sequence.str.len().describe())

+print('target stats:', train.target.describe())

+print('val target stats:', val.target.describe())

+# Find mutation region by comparing

+seqs = train.sequence.tolist()[:1000]

+ref = seqs[0]

+L = len(ref)

+diff_pos = set()

+for s in seqs[1:]:

+    if len(s)==L:

+        for i,(a,b) in enumerate(zip(ref,s)):

+            if a!=b: diff_pos.add(i)

+print('diff positions in first 1000:', sorted(diff_pos)[:50], '...', sorted(diff_pos)[-10:] if len(diff_pos)>10 else '')

+print('num diff pos:', len(diff_pos))

+print('len distribution:')

+print(train.sequence.str.len().value_counts().head())
